evals.expected_output: Use the pfs-checker skill for this pfs checker request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects pfs-checker for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_check_pfs.
Keeps the response focused on checking Perfect Forward Secrecy (PFS) support through ECDHE/DHE key exchange analysis.

evals.prompt: Check whether example.com negotiates cipher suites that provide perfect forward secrecy.
evals.expected_output: Use the pfs-checker skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects pfs-checker instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
